S&P 500 at 7,263 is running well beyond its 63-session range — equities haven't been this stretched in months. 10Y yield at 4.40% is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. Oil at $101 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from oil. Confidence sits at 58/100 — enough for a directional lean but not a high-conviction call.
